cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to find the best title for this passage. The question gives four options: A, B, C, D. The passage starts by talking about Will Steger taking people to the Arctic to show the effects of global warming. Steger is a polar explorer and environmentalist who's leading a team on a dogsled trip. They're going to upload content to a website so people can follow along. The main point seems to be about showing the effects of global warming through this expedition. Now, looking at the options. A) The Arctic Is In Danger: This mentions the Arctic being in danger, which is part of the story since the article talks about climate change affecting the Arctic. But is that the main focus? The expedition is a way to show the effects, so maybe this is a possible answer. B) Discoveries of the Arctic: Hmm. The article doesn't really talk about new discoveries. Instead, it's about documenting the effects of global warming. So maybe not B. C) Sledding Through the Arctic: The expedition is a dogsled trip, so this is literal. But is that the main point? The purpose is to show global warming effects, not just the act of sledding. So maybe C is too narrow. D) Consequences of Global Warming: This is a broader option. The passage does focus on the effects of global warming that the team will observe. But the title might need to connect the Arctic expedition to the consequences. The first paragraph says the author is going to take us north to see the effects, and the expedition is meant to show the front lines of global warming. So
